case_title: CHAMPION MORTGAGE COMPANY VS. BRILENA, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100063439)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-13-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAMPION MORTGAGE COMPANY (NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, DBA) A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BRILENA, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION BUMBACA, MICHAEL AN INDIVIDUAL BUMBACA, ADELE AN INDIVIDUAL POLLINA, JAMES A. AN INDIVIDUAL NICHOLS, MARSHA LEE INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF A REVOCABLE TRUST OF MARCH 1, 1997 ALL PERSONS UNKNOWN CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE, LEIN OR INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY ADVERSE TO PLAINTIFF'S TITLE, OR ANY CLOUD ON PLAINTIFF'S TITLE TO THE PROPERTY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-13-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-10-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-19-2019

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100058089), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAMPION MORTGAGE COMPANY (NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, DBA) A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED NOV-09-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRILENA, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100058089), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAMPION MORTGAGE COMPANY (NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, DBA) A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED NOV-05-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT POLLINA, JAMES A. AN INDIVIDUAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100059404), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAMPION MORTGAGE COMPANY (NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, DBA) A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED NOV-14-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NICHOLS, MARSHA LEE INDIVIDUALLY AND AS SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE OF A REVOCABLE TRUST OF MARCH 1, 1997

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100058089), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAMPION MORTGAGE COMPANY (NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC, DBA) A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED NOV-07-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BUMBACA, ADELE AN INDIVIDUAL
